title: analytics — health probes
description: Per-provider reachability probes + capture pipeline probes.

probes.name: analytics-posthog-reachable
probes.description: GET https://{host}/decide/?token={api_token} — verifies credentials + reachability. Only when a PostHog config is active for at least one tenant.

probes.name: analytics-amplitude-reachable
probes.description: OPTIONS request to /2/httpapi (no-op that validates reachability).

probes.name: analytics-google-analytics-4-reachable
probes.description: GA4 measurement protocol has no ping endpoint — probe uses a debug event dispatch to /mp/collect?debug_mode=true.

probes.name: analytics-batch-buffer-writable
probes.description: Redis PING + a probe key write/read. Critical — without the buffer, batched dispatch collapses.

probes.name: analytics-capture-pipeline
probes.description: Round-trip probe: fake AnalyticsEventCapturer emits a probe event tagged internal=true; probe waits up to 5s for the DispatchAnalyticsEventJob to fire. Validates the full capture → fan-out chain wiring.

probes.name: analytics-open-circuits-count
probes.description: Counts open circuits across all tenants + providers. Warn at 3+; fail at 10+ (widespread provider outage).
